instructions.summary: Authenticate the Vercel CLI once so all future deployments are fully automatic
instructions.detail: Vercel CLI is installed at ~/.npm-global/bin/vercel. One browser-based login is needed. After that, the Founder deploys autonomously on every run — no dashboard visits ever again.
instructions.exact_action: Run in Terminal: ~/.npm-global/bin/vercel login — complete the browser OAuth flow. Then run: cd ~/Developer/founder-os-seed/MVP && ~/.npm-global/bin/vercel --yes to create the project and get the live URL. Reply here with the URL.
instructions.unblocks: All future deployments — Nova will call vercel --prod automatically after every push
